'''Celia Durasha''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] native of [[Lankashiir]] and the sister of [[Raine Durasha]], one of three brothers, and was a member of the [[Durasha family]]. She was nicknamed '''Crimson''' by [[Detien Kaileel]].

==Biography==
She planned to follow her brothers into the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] but was prevented from joining the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]] by [[Reise Durasha|her father]], a [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] in the [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] who believed it was no place for a woman. Celia resented him for it and was forced to find a career elsewhere.

Until the [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destruction of Alderaan]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Celia was the [[Navigator/Legends|navigator]] aboard the [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']]. She was thrown into confusion when she discovered that her brother [[Raine Durasha|Raine]], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]], had been [[Death/Legends|killed]] by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] on [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]], while at the same time a close friend aboard the ''Kuari Princess'' was revealed to be a Rebel operative. After her friend was killed by the [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]] [[Adion Lang]], a former lover of hers, Celia escaped the ship in a passenger barge. Due to the death of her brother at the hands of the Rebellion and the loss of her best friend to the Empire, she had no love for either.

Crimson then became a [[free-trader]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who owned the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] the ''[[Starlight Red]]''. She had a tendency to get involved in what her [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] considered "heroic antics," and she also had a tendency to talk—too much, according to the droid—during [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] travels.

[[File:Crimson-under-arrest.jpg|thumb|left|100px|"Crimson" arrested]]

When she was arrested by [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]] in [[Byblos/Legends|Byblos]] [[Byblos Starport Tower 214|Starport Tower 214]], her protocol droid [[U-THR]] assumed the role of the unlikely hero and came to her rescue.

Crimson eventually fell in love with [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] smuggler [[Kaj Nedmak]] and ran several missions with him for underworld kingpins [[Bwahl]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] and [[Rass M'Guy]]. When a smuggling deal went sour, however, Bwahl hired the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Thune (bounty hunter)|Thune]] to capture them. Chasing them to [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], Thune almost did just that, and nearly killed Kaj in the process, but the smugglers turned the tables on her and escaped, stealing both her ship and her droid, U-THR.
